tweets.author: intocryptoverse
tweets.text:
In bear markets, Bitcoin will often spend more time going up than going down.

When it does go down, it goes down very quickly, sets a low, then trends up for a few weeks/months before going lower.

You can see the change in market structure from bull to bear. https://t.co/TrImvnF7rK

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
BYD is working hard to build up its network of lightning chargers around China.

Here it is having discussion w/ Hunan highway group for putting its lightning chargers in the 2064 charging spot that Hunan operates. Remind that BYD is looking to build 2000 highway charging station https://t.co/8Oi9mfcxb7

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
~1/3 of China's NG consumption is for power-gen (lower in spring). LNG import represented ~19% of China's NG consumption in 2025.

As such, LNG deliveries have fallen off the cliff just as Qatar is declaring force Majeure. Redirecting contracted LNG to countries that need it. https://t.co/oWY5gRpxPf https://t.co/c3vHrMrdEf

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
We can also cut down crude demand w/ more eShips. Hong Kong Environmental Protection Dpt just took delivery of 5 eShips, including 4 cargo & 1 pax.

A 142TEU cargo ships use 2 1935kWh battery pack w/ 2 1000MW main eMotor & 1 250kW reverse motor.
+ 2 36TEU & 1 8TEU container ships https://t.co/mCtqh2KHmO

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text: Satellites allow daily revisit globally, spotting military assets with AI algo, accurate guidance through GNSS, advanced warning on flight path of military aircraft thru detection of RF emissions & long range datalinking for FPV drone control.

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
I think we will just see shift to more Nitrogen based fertilizer vs phosphate ones. China is ramping up ammonia production (both traditional & green). It's already world's largest Urea producer by far.

So, less NG for power, more for chemical industry, especially fertilizers. https://t.co/2euo8C2ned

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
OTOH, it actually does still need to import crude bc of its vast chemical industry. Hence the continued import of discounted Iranian oil + maxing out on TMC pipeline imports & Russian oil.

Coal-to-liquid/chemical plants also become more economical.
https://t.co/q6s32vgqcl https://t.co/EUboMxMqmT

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
Tianwen-3 Mars sample return mission is entering prototype stage this yr & expect to launch in 2028 for returning sample by 2031.

Will introduce new tech like orbiters, returnees, landers, ascenders & servers.

Tianwen-2 which launched in 2025 have already traveled 700m km & https://t.co/7pPbEelIbi
